title: WayHomes
description: WayHomes is a lightweight Fabric mod that lets you save and teleport to unlimited personal waypoints, with a clean in-game interface.
body:
# Homes

**Homes** is a lightweight Fabric mod that lets you save and teleport to unlimited personal waypoints, with a clean in-game interface.

## Features

- **`/sethome <name>`** — Save your current position as a home
- **`/home <name>`** — Teleport to a saved home
- **`/delhome <name>`** — Delete a home
- **`/lookhome`** — Open a GUI showing all your homes with teleport and delete buttons

## Interface

The `/lookhome` command opens an in-game screen listing all your homes with their coordinates and dimension. Click **TP** to teleport instantly, or **X** to delete. Supports scrolling if you have more than 8 homes.

## Details

- Homes are saved **per player UUID** in a `homes.json` file inside the world folder
- Data **persists between sessions** — your homes survive server restarts
- Works in both **singleplayer and multiplayer**
- No limit on the number of homes per player

## Requirements

- Minecraft 26.1.2
- Fabric Loader 0.19.2+
- Fabric API 0.146.0+
